content.section: Quad Tank is a tier 3 tank that can be selected upon reaching level 30 using "Twin" or "Flank Guard", and at level 45, can be upgraded into "Octo Tank" or "Auto 5".

- Avoid drone tanks, high frontal DPS tanks and good Sniper class players.
- Quad Tank doesn't have recoil while attacking, use this to rush players without being slowed.
- Quad Tank cant escape well due to the lack of recoil, so using your barrels to your advantage is important.
- Position yourself well to make use of your barrels, but don't position yourself badly to be 2v1ed.

- Quad Tank alongside Twin Flank are the only two tanks to upgrade from two different tier 2 tanks.
- In one of the oldest versions, Quad Tank used to upgrade into Triple Shot at level 45, which subsequently upgraded into Octo Tank at level 60.
- It used to be a Level 45 tank that upgraded from the Triple Shot.
- Quad Tank and Twin Flank are the only Tier 3 tanks that do not gain recoil from their bullets.
